meta.title: Bruton Place IV | JQ33 DESIGN Commercial Interior Project (Montreal)
meta.description: A commercial interior case study focused on layout clarity, lighting intent, and durable finishes-designed for day-to-day operations and customer perception.

gallery.caption: Fig 01. Main customer axis / Flow + sightlines
Fig 02. Feature zone / Lighting + brand moment

narrative.label: Brief / Concept
narrative.text: The goal was simple: make the space feel premium, photograph well, and work better day-to-day. We focused on a layout that guides customers naturally, creates one or two signature moments, and keeps the build realistic for budget and timeline.

narrative.label: Execution
narrative.text: We refined lighting intent, finishes, and key viewpoints so the space looks great from the entrance, at the counter, and from main seating and consult zones. Durable materials and clear handoff notes kept quoting straightforward and protected the design during value engineering.

specifications.label: Lighting Design
specifications.value: Warm, camera-friendly layers (ambient + feature + task)

specifications.label: Flooring
specifications.value: Durable, easy-clean surface (low maintenance)

specifications.label: Joinery
specifications.value: Custom millwork for storage + clean counter moments

specifications.label: Acoustics
specifications.value: Comfort-forward noise control for conversations

meta.title: Ethereal Gallery | JQ33 DESIGN Commercial Interior Project (Montreal)
meta.description: A retail gallery concept built to feel calm and premium, with clean display planes, controlled lighting, and a layout that lets products read as the hero.

gallery.caption: Fig 01. Primary display sweep / Calm, premium atmosphere

narrative.label: Brief / Concept
narrative.text: The brief was to create a quiet, high-contrast gallery that frames product like art. The layout needed a strong central axis, flexible display zones, and a refined material palette that stays out of the way.

narrative.label: Execution
narrative.text: We tuned lighting layers for soft, shadow-free viewing, introduced slim display planes, and planned circulation that keeps the focal wall in view. The result is a calm, premium environment that supports both browsing and private appointments.

specifications.label: Lighting Design
specifications.value: Track + wash lighting to highlight product edges

specifications.label: Display
specifications.value: Modular plinths with hidden storage

specifications.label: Surfaces
specifications.value: Neutral plaster finish for consistent color rendering

specifications.label: Branding
specifications.value: Minimal signage with a single hero wall

meta.title: Obsidian Lounge | JQ33 DESIGN Commercial Interior Project (Montreal)
meta.description: A hospitality lounge focused on atmosphere, layered lighting, and durable finishes that hold up to late-night traffic and high guest turnover.

gallery.caption: Fig 01. Lounge seating / Layered lighting plan

narrative.label: Brief / Concept
narrative.text: We aimed for a dark, moody lounge that still reads premium in photos. The layout needed a clear bar focus, intimate seating clusters, and lighting that shifts from early evening to late-night energy.

narrative.label: Execution
narrative.text: We developed layered lighting zones, introduced tactile finishes, and used strategic sightlines to keep the bar as the hero. The materials were selected for durability, clean-up speed, and strong contrast under low light.

specifications.label: Lighting Design
specifications.value: Dim-to-warm layers for day-to-night transitions

specifications.label: Finishes
specifications.value: High-durability surfaces with low reflectivity

specifications.label: Seating Plan
specifications.value: Clustered seating with clear service paths

specifications.label: Bar Program
specifications.value: Feature back bar with integrated storage

meta.title: Vortex Showroom | JQ33 DESIGN Commercial Interior Project (Montreal)
meta.description: A product showroom designed for high-impact brand moments, with clear visitor flow, bold materials, and a layout built for demonstrations.

gallery.caption: Fig 02. Entry experience / Clear visitor flow

narrative.label: Brief / Concept
narrative.text: The goal was a showroom that feels bold but easy to navigate. We needed a strong entry moment, clear product sequencing, and space for live demonstrations.

narrative.label: Execution
narrative.text: We created a central demo spine with flexible perimeter bays, tuned lighting for product clarity, and aligned sightlines to the hero display. Materials were chosen to carry brand color while staying clean and durable.

specifications.label: Lighting Design
specifications.value: Balanced ambient + focused demo lighting

specifications.label: Display
specifications.value: Modular bays for rotating product lines

specifications.label: Flow
specifications.value: Clear visitor loop with direct exit access

specifications.label: Branding
specifications.value: Integrated signage at entry and demo wall

title: Canvas Studios
category: Salon / Stations, storage, and smooth flow

meta.title: Canvas Studios | JQ33 DESIGN Commercial Interior Project (Montreal)
meta.description: A salon interior focused on efficient circulation, clean storage, and a calm customer experience from arrival through checkout.

gallery.caption: Fig 01. Station rhythm / Clean, calm workflow

narrative.label: Brief / Concept
narrative.text: Canvas Studios needed a salon layout that stays calm at peak hours. The brief focused on smooth circulation, a clear reception moment, and storage that keeps the work floor clean.

narrative.label: Execution
narrative.text: We tightened station spacing, created a back bar with concealed storage, and balanced lighting for accurate color work. The material palette was selected for easy maintenance and long-term durability.

specifications.label: Lighting Design
specifications.value: Even, color-accurate task lighting

specifications.label: Storage
specifications.value: Concealed back bar with dedicated product zones

specifications.label: Flow
specifications.value: Clear circulation between stations and wash area

specifications.label: Finishes
specifications.value: Salon-grade surfaces for easy cleanup
